---
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Root Theme Configuration matching the topmate aesthetic */
  :root {
    --brand-orange: #d94d43;
    --text-light: #ffffff;
    --text-dark: #222222;
    --bg-cream: #f6f4ee;
    --card-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  }

  * {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  body {
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg-cream);
  }

  /* Core Layout splits 1/4 and 3/4 */
  .portfolio-container {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    min-height: 100vh;
  }

  @media (min-width: 992px) {
    .portfolio-container {
      grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 3.8fr;
    }
  }

  /* Left Panel: Core Profile Branding Sidebar */
  .profile-sidebar {
    background-color: var(--brand-orange);
    color: var(--text-light);
    padding: 3rem 2rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .avatar-frame {
    width: 160px;
    height: 160px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
  }

  .avatar-frame img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
  }

  .profile-sidebar h1 {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .profile-sidebar h4 {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    opacity: 0.9;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    line-height: 1.4;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
    width: 100%;
  }

  /* Social Links */
  .sidebar-socials {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
  }

  .sidebar-socials a {
    color: var(--text-light);
    opacity: 0.85;
    transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }

  .sidebar-socials a:hover {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1.1);
  }

  /* Right Panel: Main Dashboard Content Area */
  .content-showcase {
    background-color: var(--bg-cream);
    padding: 4rem 3rem;
    color: var(--text-dark);
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .content-showcase {
      padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
    }
  }

  /* Horizontal Content-Top Navigation Menu */
  .sidebar-nav {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  }

  .sidebar-nav a {
    color: #555555;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 10px 20px;
    border-radius: 30px;
    background: #ffffff;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }

  .sidebar-nav a:hover {
    color: var(--brand-orange);
    background: #ffffff;
    border-color: var(--brand-orange);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }

  .sidebar-nav a.active {
    color: #ffffff;
    background: var(--brand-orange);
    border-color: var(--brand-orange);
    font-weight: 600;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(217, 77, 67, 0.25);
  }

  /* Header Branding Row Layout */
  .digest-header-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 2rem;
    align-items: center;
    background: #ffffff;
    padding: 2.5rem;
    border-radius: 16px;
    box-shadow: var(--card-shadow);
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  @media (min-width: 768px) {
    .digest-header-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 3.5fr;
    }
  }

  .digest-logo-wrapper img {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    border-radius: 12px;
  }

  .digest-intro-text h2 {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    color: var(--text-dark);
  }

  .digest-intro-text p {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: #444444;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .showcase-section-title {
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  /* Grid Layout for Issues Content Blocks */
  .digest-issues-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 2rem;
  }

  @media (min-width: 992px) {
    .digest-issues-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }
  }

  .issue-card {
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 2rem;
    box-shadow: var(--card-shadow);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.02);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .issue-card-content h3 {
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--brand-orange);
    margin-top: 0;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }

  .issue-card-content h4 {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  .issue-card-content p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #555555;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .topics-title {
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    color: #666666;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .topics-list {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    padding-left: 1.25rem;
  }

  .topics-list li {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #444444;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }

  /* Embedded Document Frame Containers */
  .pdf-frame-wrapper {
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    background: #ffffff;
  }

  .download-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    background: var(--brand-orange);
    color: #ffffff !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .download-btn:hover {
    background: #bf3f36;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }

  hr {
    margin: 2.5rem 0;
    border: none;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  }
</style>
```


```{=html}
<div class="portfolio-container">
  <div class="profile-sidebar">
    <div class="avatar-frame">
      <img src="images/roy.jpg" alt="Roy Mwavita">
    </div>
    
    <h1>Roy Mwavita</h1>
    <h4>Research Data Analyst • Monitoring & Evaluation Specialist</h4>
    
    <div class="sidebar-socials">
      <a href="https://github.com/roy-mwavita0" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i></a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/roy-mwavita-495b50220/" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i></a>
      <a href="mailto:lennicroy@gmail.com"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i></a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="content-showcase">
    <nav class="sidebar-nav">
      <a href="index.html"><i class="fas fa-home"></i> Home</a>
      <a href="projects.html"><i class="fas fa-project-diagram"></i> Projects</a>
      <a href="dashboards.html"><i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> Dashboards</a>
      <a href="digest.html" class="active"><i class="fas fa-book-open"></i> R Toolkit Digest</a>
      <a href="newsletter.html"><i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i> Newsletter</a>
    </nav>

    <div class="digest-header-grid">
      <div class="digest-logo-wrapper">
        <img src="images/R_Toolkit_digest_logo.png" alt="R Toolkit Digest Logo">
      </div>
      <div class="digest-intro-text">
        <h2>R Toolkit Digest</h2>
        <p>A collection of practical lessons learned while working with R for data analysis, data visualization, and Monitoring, Evaluation, Accountability, and Learning (MEAL) systems.</p>
        <p>Each issue breaks down real-world techniques used in operational reporting dashboards, custom data transformation pipelines, and dynamic programmatic workflows.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="showcase-section-title">📚 Published Issues</div>
    
    <div class="digest-issues-grid">

      <div class="issue-card">
        <div class="issue-card-content">
          <h3>📊 Issue 1</h3>
          <h4>Small ggplot2 Tricks That Make Better Charts</h4>
          
          <div class="topics-title">Topics Covered:</div>
          <ul class="topics-list">
            <li>Grammar of Graphics rules</li>
            <li>Optimizing <code>geom_col()</code> bars</li>
            <li>Custom fill palettes & aesthetics</li>
            <li>Polishing alignments via <code>position_dodge()</code></li>
          </ul>
          
          <p>A practical engineering guide on improving the structural clarity, contrast mapping, and overall visual communication impact of bar charts in ggplot2.</p>
        </div>
        
        <div>
          <div class="pdf-frame-wrapper">
            <iframe src="files/improving_group_charts.pdf" width="100%" height="400px" style="border:none; display:block;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
          </div>
          <a href="files/improving_group_charts.pdf" target="_blank" class="download-btn">
            <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download PDF Document
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="issue-card">
        <div class="issue-card-content">
          <h3>📊 Issue 2</h3>
          <h4>Understanding pivot_longer() and pivot_wider()</h4>
          
          <div class="topics-title">Topics Covered:</div>
          <ul class="topics-list">
            <li>Structural data reshaping concepts in R</li>
            <li>Converting wide profiles to relational long formats</li>
            <li>Advanced tidyverse engineering pipelines</li>
          </ul>
          
          <p>A comprehensive functional guide demonstrating how to dynamically transform messy, non-relational survey datasets for fast downstream modeling and visualization.</p>
        </div>
        
        <div>
          <div class="pdf-frame-wrapper">
            <iframe src="files/reshaping_survey_data.pdf" width="100%" height="400px" style="border:none; display:block;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
          </div>
          <a href="files/reshaping_survey_data.pdf" target="_blank" class="download-btn">
            <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download PDF Document
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="issue-card">
        <div class="issue-card-content">
          <h3>📊 Issue 3</h3>
          <h4>Factors and Ordering Categories in ggplot2</h4>
          
          <div class="topics-title">Topics Covered:</div>
          <ul class="topics-list">
            <li>Deep dive into vector factors in R</li>
            <li>Explicitly setting and sorting structural factor levels</li>
            <li>Controlling explicit category mapping scales in ggplot2</li>
            <li>Creating clear, ordered Likert-scale visualization distributions</li>
          </ul>
          
          <p>A structural analytics guide to managing vector factors to systematically control how categorical groups organize themselves in tables and visualization grids.</p>
        </div>
        
        <div>
          <div class="pdf-frame-wrapper">
            <iframe src="files/factors_and_ordering_categories.pdf" width="100%" height="400px" style="border:none; display:block;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
          </div>
          <a href="files/factors_and_ordering_categories.pdf" target="_blank" class="download-btn">
            <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download PDF Document
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="issue-card">
        <div class="issue-card-content">
          <h3>📊 Issue 4</h3>
          <h4>Do More with Less Code in the Tidyverse</h4>
          
          <div class="topics-title">Topics Covered:</div>
          <ul class="topics-list">
            <li>Applying <code>across()</code> to mutate multiple metrics simultaneously</li>
            <li>Using functional loops via <code>map()</code> to eliminate manual code loops</li>
            <li>Deploying <code>reduce()</code> to join collection lists efficiently</li>
            <li>Writing clean, performant, and maintainable tidyverse scripts</li>
          </ul>
          
          <p>An efficiency manual breaking down methods for reducing code replication by programmatically looping transformations across data frame shapes and complex arrays.</p>
        </div>
        
        <div>
          <div class="pdf-frame-wrapper">
            <iframe src="files/do_more_with_less.pdf" width="100%" height="400px" style="border:none; display:block;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
          </div>
          <a href="files/do_more_with_less.pdf" target="_blank" class="download-btn">
            <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download PDF Document
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

  </div>
  
  <hr>
<div style="text-align: center; padding: 2rem 0; color: #666; font-size: 13px;">
  <i class="fas fa-copyright"></i> 2026 Roy Mwavita | Built with <a href="https://quarto.org" style="color: #d94d43; text-decoration: none;">Quarto</a>
</div>
</div>

```
